system.description:
Roll +Heart when you take time to treat someone's wounds with items, potions or physical means.

10+: You heal one condition.

7-9: Choose one: you jerry-rig something temporary that won't last; it costs you something; it takes all your concentration, taking longer and leaving you vulnerable.

results.partial: Choose one: you jerry-rig something temporary that won't last; it costs you something; it takes all your concentration, taking longer and leaving you vulnerable.
